title: Fix agent init reinit when agent.json is malformed

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether
comments.content: Kicked off background agent for GH issue #137 (agent init reinit fix). Worktree at .worktrees/fix-agent-init-reinit-malformed-json, tmux session feat-fix-agent-init-reinit-malformed-json.

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--fix-agent-init-reinit
comments.content: Plan: Restructure agent::init() to handle malformed agent.json gracefully. Three changes: (1) Add --force flag to AgentCommands::Init in main.rs, (2) Change init() to match on AgentConfig::load() Result instead of using ? — Ok(Some) without force bails, Err warns and proceeds (malformed file), Ok(None) proceeds normally, Ok(Some) with force warns and overwrites, (3) Add tests for malformed-file reinit and --force overwrite.

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether
comments.content: Completed: PR #139 merged — agent init handles malformed agent.json gracefully
